sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40577" key="e)pi[pol]a=|" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπι[πολ]-ᾷ</orth>, <sense id="n40577.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐπιπολῆς</ref> </xr> (cf. <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐπιπολή</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Mnemos.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">42.332</biblScope> </bibl> (Argos, <date TEIform="date">iv B.C.</date>).</sense> </entryFree>
